name: NovaPro X12 Smartphone
description: 6.7" AMOLED display, 5G ready, 50MP triple camera, 5000mAh battery. The flagship for those who demand maximum performance in every condition.

name: ByteTab Mini Tablet
description: 8.4" IPS display, octa-core processor, 8GB RAM. Compact powerhouse for portability without compromise.

name: GlitchPhone 9
description: 4G smartphone with 6.1" LCD, 12MP dual camera, 4000mAh. Budget-grade with underground aesthetics.

name: VoidPad Pro 11
description: 11" 2K display tablet with 12GB RAM, stylus support and all-day battery. Command the void from anywhere.

name: CrashPhone Zero
description: Entry-level 4G phone, 5.5" screen, 32MP selfie camera. When you need a backup device ready to absorb any crash.

name: DoomDial 5G
description: Mid-range 5G with 6.4" OLED, 48MP camera, 4500mAh fast-charge. Designed for the chaos of everyday life.

name: DeathBass Pro Headphones
description: Over-ear studio headphones, 40mm drivers, ANC, 30h battery. Pure audio annihilation for professionals.

name: NullPods X3 Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds, IPX5, 8h playback + 24h case, aptX Adaptive. Disappear into the signal.

name: VoidSpeaker 360
description: 360° Bluetooth speaker, IP67 waterproof, 20h battery, dual tweeters. Fill the void with sound.

name: ChaosAmp Portable Speaker
description: Compact Bluetooth 5.3 speaker, IPX4, 12h playback, USB-C charge. Chaos never sounded this clean.

name: GlitchBuds Ultra
description: Semi-open TWS earbuds with spatial audio, 10h battery, transparency mode. For audiophiles in the underground.

name: CrashNoise ANC Headphones
description: Hybrid ANC over-ear, 35mm titanium drivers, 25h battery, foldable. Crash the noise, not your workflow.

name: DoomPad Elite Controller
description: Wireless gaming controller, hall-effect sticks, 40h battery, PC/console compatible. Built for the long descent.

name: ChaosCam Stream Webcam
description: 1080p/60fps streaming webcam, AI background removal, low-light sensor. Command your stream from the shadows.

name: GlitchKey Mechanical Keyboard
description: TKL mechanical keyboard, linear switches, per-key RGB, USB-C detachable cable. Type through the static.

name: VoidMouse Pro
description: Wireless gaming mouse, 26000 DPI optical sensor, 70h battery, ultralight 68g. Zero latency, maximum doom.

name: DeathRGB Mousepad XL
description: 900x400mm gaming mousepad, RGB edge lighting, anti-fray stitching, non-slip base. Your battlefield.

name: CrashHeadset 7.1
description: Gaming headset with virtual 7.1 surround, detachable mic, 50mm drivers, USB/3.5mm. Hear them before they crash you.

name: VoidBook Air 14
description: 14" 2.8K OLED laptop, latest-gen CPU, 16GB RAM, 1TB NVMe, 18h battery. Thin as a shadow, fast as the void.

name: CrashPad Pro 15
description: 15.6" gaming laptop, dedicated GPU, 165Hz display, 32GB RAM. Built to crash—in the arena, not in life.

name: DoomChrome Laptop 13
description: 13" compact laptop with full Linux support, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD, all-day battery. The underground machine.

name: GlitchStation Mini PC
description: Compact desktop, 12-core CPU, 16GB DDR5, dual HDMI 4K output, fanless design. Small form, total power.

name: NullScreen Monitor 27
description: 27" 4K IPS monitor, 144Hz, 1ms, HDR600, USB-C 90W passthrough. Zero compromises, null reflections.

name: DeathBook Ultra
description: 16" workstation laptop, 64GB RAM, 2TB NVMe RAID, pro-grade GPU. When death is the only acceptable deadline.

name: VoidCharge 100W GaN Charger
description: 4-port GaN charger (2x USB-C PD + 2x USB-A), 100W total, foldable prongs. One charger to rule them all.

name: DoomCase Pro Laptop Bag
description: 15.6" laptop backpack, TSA-friendly, USB-A pass-through, Cordura fabric, 40L. Carry the chaos with you.

name: GlitchHub USB-C 12-in-1
description: USB-C hub: 4K HDMI, 2x USB-A 3.2, 2x USB-C, SD/microSD, Ethernet, 100W PD. One port to glitch them all.

name: CrashCam Action Camera
description: 4K/60fps action cam, 170° wide, EIS stabilization, IPX8, included mounts kit. Capture the crash.

name: NullTracker Smart Tag
description: Bluetooth 5.3 GPS tracker, IP67, 1yr battery, compatible with all major find-my networks. Never lose the signal.

name: DeathDrive 2TB Portable SSD
description: 2TB NVMe USB-C SSD, 2000MB/s read, IP68 shockproof, hardware encryption. Store everything, fear nothing.
